name: General
description: A solid starting point for anyone. The everyday life domains most people need: money, taxes, health, insurance, travel, and a calendar to tie it together.

domains.title: Money & Wealth
domains.soul:
# Money & Wealth

Your whole financial picture in one place: income, spending, savings, debt, and what you're building toward. The goal is calm clarity, not spreadsheets you never open.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Know your monthly cashflow: what comes in, what goes out
- Keep an emergency fund of 3 to 6 months of expenses
- Pay down high-interest debt, then invest the difference
- Review your money once a month, on a set day
prompts: Help me build a simple monthly budget from my income and expenses.
What should I do first: pay off debt or start investing?
How big should my emergency fund be, and how do I get there?

domains.title: Taxes
domains.soul:
# Taxes

Everything tax in one calm place: deadlines, documents, deductions, and what you owe or are owed. Never scramble in April again.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Know your filing deadlines before they arrive
- Keep tax documents in one place as they come in
- Track deductible expenses through the year, not at the end
- Avoid surprises: estimate what you'll owe ahead of time
prompts: What tax deadlines and documents should I be aware of this year?
Which of my expenses might be tax deductible?
Help me estimate whether I'll owe taxes or get a refund.

domains.title: Health
domains.soul:
# Health

Your energy, fitness, sleep, and the appointments that keep you well. Small consistent habits, tracked simply, beat heroic plans you abandon.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Stay current on checkups, dental, and screenings
- Build one sustainable movement habit you actually keep
- Protect your sleep: a consistent bedtime and wake time
- Notice patterns: energy, stress, and what drives them
prompts: Help me set up a simple, sustainable weekly movement routine.
What health checkups or screenings am I due for at my age?
I've been low on energy. Help me figure out what might be driving it.

domains.title: Insurance
domains.soul:
# Insurance

The policies that protect you: health, auto, home or renters, and life. Know what you're covered for, what you're paying, and where the gaps are.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Keep an inventory of every policy: what it covers and what it costs
- Review coverage once a year and after big life changes
- Close the dangerous gaps (liability, health, income protection)
- Know how to file a claim before you need to
domains.config:
# Config

health_plan: 
auto_policy: 
home_or_renters_policy: 
life_policy: 
annual_review_month:
prompts: Help me take an inventory of my insurance and spot any gaps.
Am I over-insured or under-insured anywhere I should fix?
Walk me through how to file a claim for a recent incident.

domains.title: Travel
domains.soul:
# Travel

Trips you're planning and trips you dream about. Keep destinations, budgets, bookings, and packing in one place so travel is exciting, not stressful.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Keep a running list of places you want to go
- Plan trips against a real budget, not a guess
- Track bookings and confirmations so nothing is lost
- Have a reusable packing checklist ready to go
prompts: Help me plan my next trip within a set budget.
Build me a reusable packing checklist for a week-long trip.
What should I book first and what can wait for my upcoming trip?

domains.title: Calendar
domains.soul:
# Calendar

What's coming up across every part of your life, in one view. Deadlines, appointments, birthdays, renewals, and the time you protect for what matters.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- See the week and month ahead at a glance
- Never miss a deadline, renewal, or important date
- Protect blocks of time for your real priorities
- Review the week ahead every Sunday
prompts: What's coming up this week that I should prepare for?
Help me set up a simple Sunday weekly-review routine.
What recurring dates and renewals should I never miss?
